subject: refactor(ux): fix tooltip clipping, remove prop drilling, extract components
body:
Three code quality improvements:

1. Portal-based Tooltip component using createPortal to document.body,
   preventing clipping when tooltips are near sidebar overflow edges.
   Replaces inline absolute-positioned tooltips in TemplatesTab.

2. ExportButtons and SaveLoadModal now use useToast() hook directly
   instead of receiving addToast as a prop. Removes prop drilling
   chain through App.jsx.

3. Extracted KeyboardShortcutsOverlay, EmptyStateGuide, ZoomControls,
   and QuickActionsBar from App.jsx, reducing it from 950+ to ~820 lines.

Tags: ui, refactor, tooltips, components, toast
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
